title: CharacterClass
description: A playable character class: display info, resource, and ability list.

description.description: Short one-line summary shown in class-selection UI.

detailed_description.description: Extended description shown in the class detail view.

colors.description: Color palette used for class UI elements.

major.description: Primary class color as a 6-digit hex string (no leading #).

minor.description: Secondary class color as a 6-digit hex string (no leading #).

resource.description: The class-specific resource (mana, rage, souls, etc.).

color.description: Resource bar color as a 6-digit hex string (no leading #).

decay.description: Resource lost per second when out of combat. 0 means no decay.

abilities.description: Active and passive abilities. Max 12 active, 6 passive.
